text:
1. First, note the time difference: Europe/Paris is UTC + 1 and US/Mountain is UTC - 7. So the time difference between Europe/Paris and US/Mountain is 8 hours behind.
2. Convert 9 PM (21:00) to US/Mountain time: 21:00 - 8:00 = 13:00.
3. Since we are subtracting hours and not crossing a day - changing boundary in a non - trivial way, the date remains October 15, 1591.
FINAL_ANSWER: 1591 - 10 - 15 13:00
